sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4444" key="a)llognw/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλλο-γνώς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n4444.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unknown, strange</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:126" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">126</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
